title: looptap
description: Behavioral signals from coding agent transcripts

signal-summary.title: Signal summary
signal-summary.description: Count and average confidence by signal type
signal-summary.sql: select signal_type, count(*) as n, round(avg(confidence), 2) as avg_confidence, round(min(confidence), 2) as min_confidence, round(max(confidence), 2) as max_confidence from signals group by signal_type order by n desc

hotspots.title: Sessions with most signals
hotspots.description: Which sessions are generating the most noise?
hotspots.sql: select s.id, s.project, s.model, s.total_turns, s.tool_calls, count(sig.id) as signal_count, group_concat(distinct sig.signal_type) as signal_types from sessions s join signals sig on s.id = sig.session_id group by s.id order by signal_count desc limit 20

failure-log.title: Failure log
failure-log.description: Every failure signal with evidence and turn context
failure-log.sql: select sig.session_id, sig.turn_idx, sig.confidence, sig.evidence, t.role, substr(t.content, 1, 200) as content_preview from signals sig left join turns t on sig.session_id = t.session_id and sig.turn_idx = t.idx where sig.signal_type = 'failure' order by sig.confidence desc

loop-log.title: Loop log
loop-log.description: Tool call death spirals — same tool, same args, same hope
loop-log.sql: select sig.session_id, sig.turn_idx, sig.confidence, sig.evidence, t.tool_name, substr(t.content, 1, 200) as content_preview from signals sig left join turns t on sig.session_id = t.session_id and sig.turn_idx = t.idx where sig.signal_type = 'loop' order by sig.confidence desc

signals-by-project.title: Signals by project
signals-by-project.description: Which projects cause the most agent distress?
signals-by-project.sql: select s.project, count(sig.id) as signal_count, count(distinct s.id) as session_count, round(1.0 * count(sig.id) / count(distinct s.id), 1) as signals_per_session, group_concat(distinct sig.signal_type) as signal_types from sessions s join signals sig on s.id = sig.session_id group by s.project order by signals_per_session desc

vibes-check.title: Vibes check
vibes-check.description: How did each session end? Satisfaction vs disengagement vs silence.
vibes-check.sql: select s.id, s.project, s.total_turns, coalesce((select sig.signal_type from signals sig where sig.session_id = s.id and sig.signal_type in ('satisfaction', 'disengagement') order by sig.turn_idx desc limit 1), 'neutral') as ending_vibe, s.started_at, s.ended_at from sessions s order by s.started_at desc

model-comparison.title: Model comparison
model-comparison.sql: select s.model, count(distinct s.id) as sessions, count(sig.id) as signals, round(1.0 * count(sig.id) / count(distinct s.id), 1) as signals_per_session from sessions s left join signals sig on s.id = sig.session_id group by s.model order by signals_per_session desc

exhaustion-events.title: Exhaustion events
exhaustion-events.sql: select sig.session_id, sig.turn_idx, sig.evidence, substr(t.content, 1, 300) as content_preview from signals sig left join turns t on sig.session_id = t.session_id and sig.turn_idx = t.idx where sig.signal_type = 'exhaustion' order by sig.session_id, sig.turn_idx
